field.name: ma_tc
field.check: ma_tc <> '' and ma_tc not in (select ma_tc from hrmapbh)

field.name: f_ma_tinh
field.check: f_ma_tinh <> '' and f_ma_tinh not in (select ma_tinh from hrdmtinh)

field.name: f_ma_quan
field.check: f_ma_quan <> '' and not exists (select 1 from hrdmquan a where @@table.f_ma_tinh = a.ma_tinh and @@table.f_ma_quan = a.ma_quan)

field.name: f_ma_phuong
field.check: f_ma_phuong <> '' and not exists (select 1 from hrdmphuong a where @@table.f_ma_tinh = a.ma_tinh and @@table.f_ma_quan = a.ma_quan and @@table.f_ma_phuong = a.ma_phuong)

processing.text:
if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'hrStandardSICodeMappingAddress', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end
declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @r int
alter table @@table alter column ma_tc char(32) alter table @@table alter column f_ma_tinh char(32) alter table @@table alter column f_ma_quan char(32) alter table @@table alter column f_ma_phuong char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_tc, f_ma_tinh, f_ma_quan, f_ma_phuong)
if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join hrmapbhdd b on a.ma_tc = b.ma_tc and a.f_ma_tinh = b.f_ma_tinh and a.f_ma_quan = b.f_ma_quan and a.f_ma_phuong = b.f_ma_phuong
-- Checking &Checking;
select a.* into #k from @@table a join hrmapbhdd b on a.ma_tc = b.ma_tc and a.f_ma_tinh = b.f_ma_tinh and a.f_ma_quan = b.f_ma_quan and a.f_ma_phuong = b.f_ma_phuong delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.ma_tc = b.ma_tc and a.f_ma_tinh = b.f_ma_tinh and a.f_ma_quan = b.f_ma_quan and a.f_ma_phuong = b.f_ma_phuong
-- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
